briefdescription.para: This function looks for the configuration of PCIe from the configTable based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XPciePsu_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the config space and PCIe bridge.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer
pointer to XPciePsu_Config instrance Pointer.
config brigReg address

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success err on failure

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 *DataPtr)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_ReadConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: This function read from remote configuration space location.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer
location of the address to read data from.
pointer store date available in the offset

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 Data)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_WriteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: This function write to remote configuration space location.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer
location of the address to write data.
to be written on to the offset

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the XPciePsu instance to operate on.
from beginning of IP own configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
from beggininng of IP own configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_ComposeExternalConfigAddress

briefdescription.para: This function Composes configuration space location.

simplesect.para: location address of the composed address

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u8 CapId)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_HasCapability

briefdescription.para: This function returns whether capability Id is available or not for the particular Function.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer
is the number of the Bus
is the number of the Device
is number of the Function
id to check capability pointer availability

simplesect.para: u32 0 if capability is not available 1 if capability is available

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_PrintAllCapabilites

briefdescription.para: This function prints all the available capabilities in the Function.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XPciePsu Instance Pointer
is the number of the Bus
is the number of the Device
is number of the Function

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function reads a register value from specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: BaseAddr of the register
Offset from the base address to be read

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register value to specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: Base Address of the register
Offset from the base address to be written
Value to be written

briefdescription.para: This file contains the software API definition of the Xilinx PSU PCI IP (psu_pcie).

detaileddescription.para: This driver provides "C" function interface to application/upper layer to access the hardware.

Features The driver provides its user with entry points
To initialize and configure itself and the hardware
To access PCIe configuration space locally
The XPciePsu_Config structure is used by the driver to configure itself. This configuration structure is typically created by the tool-chain based on HW build properties.
To support multiple runtime loading and initialization strategies employed by various operating systems, the driver instance can be initialized in the following way:

listitem.para: XPciePsu_LookupConfig(DeviceId) - Use the device identifier to find the static configuration structure defined in xpciepsu_g.c. This is setup by the tools.

XPciePsu_CfgInitialize(InstancePtr, CfgPtr, EffectiveAddress) - Uses a configuration structure provided by the caller. If running in a system with address translation, the provided virtual memory base address replaces the physical address present in the configuration structure.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 bs 08/21/2018 First release
